name: Gx
description: 4HP active expander for Metropolix. Adds 8 gate/trigger/clock jacks assigned from Metropolix's MX menu (Transport, Prob Clocks, Mod Clocks, Stage Num, Mod Stage Num). Connects via I²C cable plus its own bus-board power. Incompatible with Metropolix Backpack.

outputs.description: Gate/trigger/clock output 1. Function is set globally on Metropolix via ALT + MX. Depending on MX EXPANDER mode this carries: Run gate (Transport A/B/C), x1 clock at 100% probability (Prob Clocks), MOD Lane 1 clock (Mod Clocks), a stage-1 gate for the assigned Track (Stage Num) or MOD lane (Mod Stage Num).
Gate/trigger/clock output 2. MX-assigned. Typical modes: Reset trigger (Transport A/B/C), x1 clock at 75% probability (Prob Clocks), MOD Lane 2 clock, or stage-2 gate.
Gate/trigger/clock output 3. MX-assigned. Typical modes: /1 clock (Transport A/B), x4 clock (Transport C), x1 clock at 50% probability, MOD Lane 3 clock, or stage-3 gate.
Gate/trigger/clock output 4. MX-assigned. Typical modes: /2 clock (Transport A), /3 clock (Transport B), x2 clock (Transport C), x1 clock at 25% probability, MOD Lane 4 clock, or stage-4 gate.
Gate/trigger/clock output 5. MX-assigned. Typical modes: /4 clock (Transport A/B), x1 clock (Transport C), /2 clock at 100% probability, MOD Lane 5 clock, or stage-5 gate.

Gate/trigger/clock output 6. MX-assigned. Typical modes: /4 clock +2 offset (Transport A), /5 clock (Transport B), /2 clock (Transport C), /2 clock at 75% probability, MOD Lane 6 clock, or stage-6 gate.
Gate/trigger/clock output 7. MX-assigned. Typical modes: /8 clock (Transport A/B), /4 clock (Transport C), /2 clock at 50% probability, MOD Lane 7 clock, or stage-7 gate.
Gate/trigger/clock output 8. MX-assigned. Typical modes: /16 clock (Transport A/B), /8 clock (Transport C), /2 clock at 25% probability, MOD Lane 8 clock, or stage-8 gate.

behaviors.name: I²C expander (requires host + power)
behaviors.trigger: 6-pin I²C cable to Metropolix, separate 10-pin power cable to bus board
behaviors.description: Gx is an active module: it needs its own 10-pin power connection to the eurorack bus board AND a 6-pin I²C cable to the Metropolix's I²C port on the back. Always power down before connecting/disconnecting the I²C cable. Not compatible with the Metropolix Backpack — you can install one or the other, not both.

behaviors.name: MX EXPANDER — Transport A / B / C
behaviors.trigger: ALT + MX on Metropolix → MX EXPANDER = Transport A/B/C
behaviors.description: Jacks 1–2 carry global Run gate and Reset trigger. Jacks 3–8 carry a bank of clock divisions/multiples of Metropolix's master clock. A: /1, /2, /4, /4+2-offset, /8, /16. B: /1, /3, /4, /5, /8, /16. C: x4, x2, x1, /2, /4, /8. MX ASSIGN is ignored in these modes.

behaviors.name: MX EXPANDER — Prob Clocks
behaviors.trigger: ALT + MX → MX EXPANDER = Prob Clocks
behaviors.description: Jacks 1–4 emit an x1 clock at 100%, 75%, 50%, 25% probability respectively. Jacks 5–8 emit a /2 clock at 100%, 75%, 50%, 25% probability. Useful for generative rhythms.

behaviors.name: MX EXPANDER — Mod Clocks
behaviors.trigger: ALT + MX → MX EXPANDER = Mod Clocks
behaviors.description: Jacks 1–8 output the clock for Metropolix MOD Lanes 1–8 respectively, each following that lane's CLOCK DIV setting on the DIV screen. MX ASSIGN is ignored.

behaviors.name: MX EXPANDER — Stage Num
behaviors.trigger: ALT + MX → MX EXPANDER = Stage Num, MX ASSIGN = Track 1 or Track 2
behaviors.description: Each jack 1–8 emits a gate that is high while the correspondingly numbered stage is playing on the selected Track. Not affected by Metropolix's Gate Length settings. Muted Track → gates also muted. With Loopy on + sequencer stopped, Stage Player button presses fire the matching stage gates.

behaviors.name: MX EXPANDER — Mod Stage Num
behaviors.trigger: ALT + MX → MX EXPANDER = Mod Stage Num, MX ASSIGN = MOD Lane 1–8
behaviors.description: Each jack 1–8 emits a gate that is high while the correspondingly numbered stage plays on the selected MOD Lane. Muted MOD Lane → gates also muted. Useful for stage-synchronous triggers on mod-lane timelines.

behaviors.name: Gx vs Qx
behaviors.description: Metropolix supports either Gx or Qx as its expander (not both). Qx adds CV/clock+MIDI features; Gx is a pure 8-jack gate/clock expander. Electrical behavior on the 8 jacks is identical — this sheet applies to the Gx.

patchIdeas.name: Global transport fan-out (Transport A)
patchIdeas.patch: MX EXPANDER = Transport A · Gx 1 Run + Gx 2 Reset drive downstream sequencers · Gx 3–8 = /1, /2, /4, /4+2, /8, /16 clock tree for percussion and modulators
patchIdeas.diagram:
GX:
- Gx (1) g> Beads (Freeze gate) // Run
- Gx (2) t> Marbles (t reset)
- Gx (3) c> Pam's (Clk In) // /1
- Gx (5) c> Kick (Trig) // /4 downbeat
- Gx (6) c> Snare (Trig) // /4 w/ +2 offset = backbeat
- Gx (7) c> Hat (Trig) // /8
- Gx (8) c> LFO (Reset) // /16

patchIdeas.name: Probabilistic hats & perc (Prob Clocks)
patchIdeas.patch: MX EXPANDER = Prob Clocks · Gx 1–4 = x1 clock at 100/75/50/25% → layered hi-hats · Gx 5–8 = /2 clock at 100/75/50/25% → sparse percussion
patchIdeas.diagram:
GX:
- Gx (1) c> Hat-closed (Trig)  // 100%
- Gx (2) c> Hat-open (Trig)    // 75%
- Gx (3) c> Shaker (Trig)      // 50%
- Gx (4) c> Ghost-snare (Trig) // 25%
- Gx (5) c> Tom-low (Trig)     // /2 100%
- Gx (8) c> FX-trig (Trig)     // /2 25%

patchIdeas.name: Stage-gated events (Stage Num, Track 1)
patchIdeas.patch: MX EXPANDER = Stage Num · MX ASSIGN = Trk 1 · Gx 1–8 fire only while stage 1–8 plays on Track 1 · route to scene-change triggers or sample choke
patchIdeas.diagram:
GX:
- Gx (1) g> Morphagene (Record)      // only during Stage 1
- Gx (4) t> Plaits (Model CV up)     // stage-4 accent
- Gx (8) g> Mixup (Mute Ch3)         // duck on stage 8

patchIdeas.name: Per-MOD-lane clocking (Mod Clocks)
patchIdeas.patch: MX EXPANDER = Mod Clocks · each Gx jack = its MOD lane's CLOCK DIV · use as 8 independently-divided clocks for envelopes, LFOs, sequencers
patchIdeas.diagram:
GX:
- Gx (1) c> Maths (Ch1 Trig)   // MOD 1 div
- Gx (2) c> Maths (Ch4 Trig)   // MOD 2 div
- Gx (3) c> Stages (Clk)       // MOD 3 div
- Gx (4) c> Pam's (Clk In)     // MOD 4 div
